chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 72 of 2016 Alongwith Special Sales Tax Reference Application 79 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.2192/2016 08.10.2025 Mr. Anwar Kashif Mumtaz, advocate for the respondent Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, advocate files vakalatnamas on behalf of the applicant in both reference applications, which are taken on record and under instructions, does not press these reference applications, which are dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Office is instructed to place a copy of this order in the connected SSTRA listed above. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
